title: Timestamp Policy
content: Unix epoch milliseconds. Must be within 5 seconds of server time. Clock skew handling required.

title: Nonce Policy
content: UUID v4 per request. Never reused within timestamp window.

title: Payload Hashing
content: SHA-256 of request body. Empty string for GET requests.

title: Signature Algorithm Placeholder
content: HMAC-SHA256 of canonical string with API secret. Placeholder only — no real signing.

title: Redaction Requirement
content: Secret never logged. Signature redacted in audit logs. Only last 4 chars of key visible.

title: Replay Protection
content: Timestamp + nonce combination prevents replay. Server-side nonce cache recommended.

title: Clock Skew Handling
content: Requests outside 5-second window rejected. NTP sync recommended.

title: Signing Failure Handling
content: Signing failure aborts request. No fallback to unsigned. Incident logged.

title: Audit Event Requirement
content: Every signing attempt logged: timestamp, key_id (redacted), success/failure, reason.

title: Credential Dependency
content: Signing requires credential vault with API secret. Not implemented.

title: No-Submit Dependency
content: Signing does not grant submit permission. Submit gate remains locked.
